prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Ford Modular 5.0L Coyote V8 (Aluminator XS, engine code: M-6007-M50XS)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** and a **Centerforce Dual Friction clutch** for improved torque handling up to 550 lb-ft.

Full **Titan Motorsport GT4-spec suspension overhaul** featuring **Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers** with custom valving for the Guara’s aluminum monocoque chassis, **SuperPro polybushings** (front/rear subframe and control arms), and **AP Racing CP8650 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers** with **Brembo HTC-64T high-carbon rotors** for endurance braking.

Forced induction via a **Rotrex C38-91 centrifugal supercharger** (12 psi max boost) with a **VMP Performance Coyote-specific intercooler kit**, **Siemens 1000cc injectors**, and a **Holley Dominator EFI ECU** tuned on a **Dynojet 424xLC2** chassis dyno for 650+ WHP on E85, retaining the stock **De Tomaso-specific dry-sump oiling system** with an **Aviaid 8-stage pump** and **Moroso accumulator**.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Guara-widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **RWB-style TE37V wheels (18x10.5 +25 front, 18x12 +35 rear)** in **Gunmetal Bronze** from Work Wheels, shod in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)** for track-focused grip.

Custom **Aeromotions active rear wing** (carbon fiber, 3-position adjustability) with **Gurney flaps** and **integrated LED brake cooling ducts**, paired with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** featuring **NACA ducts** for the supercharger intercooler and **custom titanium exhaust outlets** (dual 3.5" tips) from **Fabspeed Motorsport**.

Interior stripped and refinished with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara inserts)** and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** with **integrated AiM MXS Strada dash**, and **custom aluminum pedal covers** from **3D Carbon** to match the **De Tomaso heritage script** on the shift knob (Tremec-specific).
